title: Relay: payment watcher Tokio task
description:
Background Tokio task in the relay that scans Zcash compact blocks for subscription payments and calls set_subscription() on confirmed payment.

What: new file relay/src/payment_watcher.rs; spawned from main.rs after relay starts.

Algorithm:
1. pub fn spawn_payment_watcher(state: AppState, lightwalletd_url: String) -> JoinHandle<()>
   - Returns early (no-op) if state.inner.merchant is None.
2. Extract merchant IVK bytes from dfvk: dfvk.ivk_bytes() -> [u8;32].
   - NEVER log these bytes.
3. Create SaplingIvkDecryptor::new(&ivk_bytes).expect('merchant IVK must be valid').
4. Connect LightwalletdClient::connect(&lightwalletd_url).await.
5. Create CompactBlockScanner::new(lwd_client, merchant_wallet_store, Box::new(decryptor)).
6. Call scanner.load_state().await — required before scan_to_tip().
7. Loop forever with tokio::time::interval(Duration::from_secs(30)):
   a. Call scanner.scan_to_tip().await — scan until tip reached.
   b. For each new note discovered (scanner stores them; query wallet_store.unspent_notes() after scan):
      - Reconstruct the payment address from note.note_diversifier + note.note_pk_d (see note below).
      - Look up state.inner.store.get_invoice_by_address(&address_string).await.
      - If None: note is not for a subscription invoice — skip.
      - If Some(invoice): check note.value_zatoshi >= invoice.amount_zatoshi (reject under-payment).
      - Check confirmation depth: scanner returns current tip; note.block_height must be <= tip - 10.
      - If all checks pass: call state.inner.store.set_subscription(&invoice.pub_id, Utc::now() + 30 days).
      - Call state.inner.store.delete_invoice(&invoice.address).
      - Call wallet_store.mark_note_spent(note_id, 'subscription').await (prevents re-processing).
      - Send subscription_active notification to live client: state.deliver_live(&invoice.pub_id, ...).
   c. Call state.inner.store.purge_expired_invoices().await periodically (every 5 minutes).
8. On scanner error: log warn!, sleep 30s, reconnect and retry.

Note on address reconstruction from note:
- note.note_diversifier is Option<Vec<u8>> (11 bytes); note.note_pk_d is Option<Vec<u8>> (32 bytes).
- A PaymentAddress can be reconstructed via sapling::PaymentAddress::from_parts(diversifier, pk_d).
- Encode as UA string using the same sapling_address_as_testnet_ua pattern from wallet/tests/e2e_testnet.rs.
- If note_diversifier or note_pk_d is None, skip the note (incomplete decryption).

Defensive rules:
- IVK bytes must NEVER appear in log output.
- Confirmation depth check must use current tip from scanner, not a stale value.
- set_subscription() must only be called after amount AND confirmations checks pass.
- On panic inside the watcher task, log error and restart (use loop + catch_unwind or tokio::spawn with restart logic).
- The watcher owns its WalletStore handle; do not share with relay's request handlers.

Tests:
- Unit: given a mock store with an invoice and a matching note, confirm set_subscription is called.
- Unit: under-paid note does not trigger set_subscription.
- Unit: note with insufficient confirmations does not trigger set_subscription.
(Tests can mock the store — the payment watcher logic is pure enough to test without a real scanner.)
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie-relay passes; relay starts watcher task without panicking
